svg.title: Production Project Management Tool — Full System Architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture: Client (React/Vite), API Gateway (Node/Express), and Data layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, Cloudinary, Socket.io)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Auth UI components')

sendPrompt('What charts are in the analytics dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How do real-time notifications work in the frontend?')
sendPrompt('What AI features does the frontend expose?')

g.text: Node.js · Express.js · Socket.io server · JWT middleware
